acceptance.baseline: No first-class process_video pre-launch input_quality stage/artifact or named low-angle/not-fully-visible rejection reason.
acceptance.after: stage order includes input_quality after calibration and before tracking; emits input_quality.json, PIPELINE_SUMMARY top-level input_quality, and stages[input_quality].metrics.input_quality; advisory bands degraded_input with court_not_fully_visible_low_angle, strict fail-closes before tracking.
acceptance.target: Cheap configurable pre-heavy input-quality gate with advisory default, strict mode, artifact, summary block, and owner-policy rejection reason.

acceptance.baseline: BODY summary metric was empty when bypass provenance existed.
acceptance.after: stages[body].metrics.postchain_bypassed_stages is populated from body_stage_phase_timing.json postchain_bypasses with fallback to raw-knob provenance; fixture covers the six-stage bypass case.
acceptance.target: Thread existing BODY postchain bypass provenance into pipeline_summary.

acceptance.baseline: compute-match-stats was not wired as a process_video post-stage.
acceptance.after: match_stats stage runs after manifest, emits match_stats.json when placement.json and court_zones.json exist, skips fail-open with reason=missing_inputs when absent, and supports --no-match-stats.
acceptance.target: Default optional BODY+COURT-only non-blocking match-stats consumer with loud skip reason and opt-out.

acceptance.baseline: revision 6; no input_quality.preflight or stats.match_stats_v0 WIRED_DEFAULT entries.
acceptance.after: revision 7; added input_quality.preflight WIRED_DEFAULT and stats.match_stats_v0 WIRED_DEFAULT; DEFAULT_INPUT_QUALITY_MODE selection constant is covered.
acceptance.target: Two new WIRED_DEFAULT entries plus revision bump.

acceptance.after: 3301 passed, 6 failed, 26 skipped, 7 warnings in 2567.69s; all six failures are loopback TCP bind PermissionError [Errno 1] Operation not permitted, confirmed by direct 127.0.0.1 bind probe.

changes: configs/racketsport/best_stack.json:79 added input_quality.preflight WIRED_DEFAULT with advisory/strict/off modes, cadence, thresholds, and court_not_fully_visible_low_angle owner-policy rejection.
configs/racketsport/best_stack.json:123 added stats.match_stats_v0 WIRED_DEFAULT with BODY+COURT inputs and --no-match-stats opt-out.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:190 added best-stack-derived input-quality and match-stats defaults.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:523 inserted input_quality before tracking in the pipeline order.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:548 inserted match_stats after manifest as an optional post-stage.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:972 implemented input_quality preflight artifact, summary metrics, advisory degraded_input behavior, and strict fail-close.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:3436 implemented fail-open BODY+COURT match_stats.json emission.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:3657 added top-level PIPELINE_SUMMARY input_quality block.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:5431 wired both new entries into resolved best-stack config/overrides.

tests/racketsport/test_best_stack_manifest.py:50, tests/racketsport/test_best_stack_resolution.py:127, tests/racketsport/test_process_video.py:1538 added coverage for the new manifest entries, defaults/overrides, input-quality gate, bypass metric, and match-stats stage.
runs/lanes/w7_pipepolish_20260709/report.json:1 wrote the lane report artifact; JSON valid and structurally checked against the lane schema fields.

full_suite.failure_notes: All six failures are unrelated review-server token tests that fail at TCPServer(('127.0.0.1', 0), ...) with PermissionError [Errno 1] Operation not permitted. A direct socket.bind(('127.0.0.1', 0)) probe fails the same way in this sandbox. Focused blast-radius suite passed: 166 passed.

honest_issues: The full census is not literally green in this sandbox because loopback TCP binds are blocked. I verified the same failure outside pytest, so these are environment/preexisting failures rather than lane regressions.
git pull --ff-only could not update .git/FETCH_HEAD due sandbox write denial. I reoriented on main and confirmed HEAD 90c2e5589 contains ecb086b48 as an ancestor.
The venv does not have jsonschema installed, so I could not run formal jsonschema validation; I did run json.tool and a local structural validator for the report schema shape.
No branch or commit was created. Preexisting unrelated dirty/untracked files were left untouched.
next: Run the loopback review-server tests in an environment that permits 127.0.0.1 ephemeral binds if a literally green full census is required.
